title: Free Energy Perturbation (FEP + TI + BAR) Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: DG = -(1/beta)*ln<exp(-beta*(U_B - U_A))>_A;  TI: DG = integral_0^1 <dU/dl>_l dl
E.inverse: recover constitutive parameters for Free Energy Perturbation (FEP + TI + BAR)

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=50) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class pmx, FEP+/Schrodinger, GROMACS-FEP; MBAR / PyMBAR estimator provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
